title: calandrinia ciliata
intro: Calandrinia ciliata, also known as Red Maire or Pink Purslane, is a succulent plant species native to the Americas. It is prized for its edible and medicinal properties, having anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The plant has been used to treat conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive problems, due to its high content of vitamins A and C, as well as its antioxidant properties. Calandrinia ciliata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, salves, and infusions, which can be used to soothe and heal the skin and body.
